info.english_meaning: to speak to tell to explain to talk
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: RO devaSabde gadayet vyaktavAci gadecCapi' (Slo. 110) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: nirdeSa karanA BAzaRa karanA GozaRA karanA bulAnA batAnA sUcanA karanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'praRyagAdId rAkzasendram' (Bawwi॰9.99) vyaktataramavocat savistaraM vA vyaktirvistftirvA praSabdavAcyaH prakarzaH niSabdastu viSezaM nAha yaTA nigadavyAKyAtaH (granTaH) ityatra nigada iti pAWamAtramAcazwe
'na hi nimbAtsravetkzOdraM loke vigaditaM vacaH' (rA0) viSezeRa gaditamu bahulamuccAritam
'sArparAjYIrhotA nigadet' (SAM0 SrO0 13117) nigadet SaMset gAyet naYaBAve nigadyate naYiti nipAto'BAvamAcazwe
'maKAMSaBAjAM praTamo manIziBistvameva devendra sadA nigadyase' (raGu0 344) nigadyase saMjYAyase samAKyAyase
'pulakEH priyaM navavaDUrnyagadat' (SiSu0 676) nyagadat asUcayat prAvedayat prAKyApayat
'Darme nigaditaScEva piturnirdeSakArakaH' (rA0 453) Darme DarmAcaraRe nigaditaH praKyAtaH
'(gadAH) asmiYSAstre nigaditAH' (sUSruta0 238121) nigaditA viSizya nirdizwAH parigaRitAH

'yadaDItamavijYAtaM nigadenEva Sabdyate' (ni0 1181) nigada uccAraRamAtram iti nigadavyAKyAtam pAWamAtreREva vyaktArTam vyAKyAnAnapekzam nigado gadyAtmakaM stotram nigada iti ca yajuriti ca miTo Bidyete yajuranuccEruccAryate
'ABirgATABiravyagraH praSnaM pratijagAda ha' (BA0 anu0 1248) pratijagAda pratyuvAca
